_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of encryption algorithms and cyber capabilities/tools (e.g., SSL, PGP).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.527), SP-K-007 (SP, cosine: 0.519).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.517). Shared vocabulary: [encryption, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [algorithms, capabilities, cyber, pgp, ssl, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, controls, data, identity, isolation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.866, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of encryption algorithms and cyber capabilities/tools (e.g., SSL, PGP)" and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.592 > STS 0.517 (gap +0.075). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [encryption, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [encryption, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [algorithms, capabilities, cyber, pgp, ssl, tools]. WIDAI-only: [access, audit, controls, data, identity, isolation].
